# Authsome

> Agent identity for third-party APIs. Authsome lets an agent prove who it is when calling a site like Stripe, Linear, or Slack, so the site can route credentials, scope access, and log audit trails without per-agent custom code.

For the complete documentation in one file, see [llms-full.txt](https://authsome.dev/llms-full.txt).

## Getting started

- [Quickstart](https://authsome.dev/docs/quickstart.md): Install the CLI and run your first authenticated agent in five minutes.
- [Concepts](https://authsome.dev/docs/concepts.md): Agent identity, credential routing, scoped tokens, audit trails.
- [Install](https://authsome.dev/docs/install.md): `pip install authsome` or `uvx authsome@latest`.
- [Run an agent](https://authsome.dev/docs/run.md): The `authsome run` command and how it injects credentials at request time.

## API reference

- [HTTP API](https://authsome.dev/docs/api/http.md): Endpoints, headers, errors.
- [Python client library](https://authsome.dev/docs/api/python.md): `authsome` package reference.
- [Node.js client library](https://authsome.dev/docs/api/node.md): `@authsome/client` reference.
- [OpenAPI spec (YAML)](https://authsome.dev/openapi.yaml)
- [OpenAPI spec (JSON)](https://authsome.dev/openapi.json)

## Auth

How agents authenticate with Authsome, and how Authsome authenticates outbound to providers on behalf of an agent.

- [Authentication overview](https://authsome.dev/docs/auth.md): API keys, OAuth, agent-scoped tokens, rotation policy.
- [API keys](https://authsome.dev/docs/auth/api-keys.md): Personal access tokens for local development.
- [OAuth providers](https://authsome.dev/docs/auth/oauth.md): The 13 OAuth2 providers Authsome bundles.
- [Bearer tokens](https://authsome.dev/docs/auth/bearer.md): Per-request authorization headers.
- [Scoped tokens](https://authsome.dev/docs/auth/scoped-tokens.md): How to grant an agent narrow access without sharing your master credentials.

## Providers

The 44 third-party services Authsome ships with out of the box. See the [provider matrix](https://authsome.dev/docs/providers.md) for live status.

- [Provider list](https://authsome.dev/docs/providers.md): All 44 providers, OAuth vs API-key, supported actions.
- [Stripe](https://authsome.dev/docs/providers/stripe.md)
- [Slack](https://authsome.dev/docs/providers/slack.md)
- [Linear](https://authsome.dev/docs/providers/linear.md)
- [GitHub](https://authsome.dev/docs/providers/github.md)
- [Resend](https://authsome.dev/docs/providers/resend.md)

## MCP

Authsome ships as an MCP server so agents in Claude, Cursor, Warp, and any MCP-compatible client can use it without a separate install.

- [MCP server](https://authsome.dev/docs/mcp.md): Setup, configuration, transport.
- [MCP discovery](https://authsome.dev/.well-known/mcp.json)
- [Agent skills](https://authsome.dev/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json)

## SDKs

- [Python SDK](https://authsome.dev/docs/sdk/python.md): `pip install authsome`.
- [Node.js SDK](https://authsome.dev/docs/sdk/node.md): `npm install @authsome/client`.
- [Go SDK](https://authsome.dev/docs/sdk/go.md): `go get github.com/agentr-labs/authsome-go`.
- [CLI](https://authsome.dev/docs/cli.md): `authsome` command-line tool.

## Webhooks

- [Webhook events](https://authsome.dev/docs/webhooks.md): All emitted event types.
- [Verifying signatures](https://authsome.dev/docs/webhooks/verify.md): HMAC verification.

## Errors

- [Error reference](https://authsome.dev/docs/errors.md): Every error code, when it fires, and how to recover.
- [Rate limits](https://authsome.dev/docs/rate-limits.md): Per-key, per-provider, and burst limits.

## Examples

- [Send an email with Resend](https://authsome.dev/docs/examples/resend-email.md)
- [Create a Linear issue](https://authsome.dev/docs/examples/linear-issue.md)
- [Charge a Stripe customer](https://authsome.dev/docs/examples/stripe-charge.md)
- [Post to Slack](https://authsome.dev/docs/examples/slack-post.md)

## Pricing

- [Pricing](https://authsome.dev/pricing.md): Plans, per-agent quotas, and provider-side cost passthrough.

## Changelog

- [Changelog](https://authsome.dev/changelog.md): Recent releases.

## Optional

- [Brand](https://authsome.dev/brand.md): Logos and color palette.
- [Status](https://authsome.dev/status.md): Live uptime.
- [Contact](https://authsome.dev/contact.md): For support, partnerships, security disclosures.
